title: search insensitive

posts.author: Marc_Furberg (Marc Furberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi developpers,

it would be great to be able to find items without sensitivity by adding a parameter like “case_sensitive” TRUE / FALSE !

myemail@mysite.fr found even if in monday it’s “MyEmail@mySite.Fr” ou MYEMAIL@MYSITE.FR or others !
